ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price for the day */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price during the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the day */,
  "market_cap" INTEGER /* Market capitalization for the day */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price for the day */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the market data */,
  "price_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Percentage change in volume from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was created */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" TEXT /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification for the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, triggered) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* The last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news feed entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the news is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news feed entry */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news feed entry */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the news was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news (e.g., news website, blog) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image associated with the news */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the news content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the post is about */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the post was made */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the post was published */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments the post has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been shared */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A score representing the overall engagement of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the forum post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the forum post */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the post was published */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the forum post (e.g., general, technical, news) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the post */,
  "last_reply_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last reply to the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the report is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the report has received */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been downloaded */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the report */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the report has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charting_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charting tool */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the charting tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the charting tool */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of charting tool (e.g., price, volume, technical) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the charting tool */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the tool was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the charting tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_analytics" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the model is for */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of predictive model (e.g., time series, machine learning) */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last trained */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_analytics_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the platform accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
